zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Sandes於大約1369年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆時，他的父親John Sandys20歲，母親Joan20歲。他於1401年與Agnes Warrener在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1435年6月17日在英國英格蘭享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sandes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of various places so named in Galicia (Spain). Compare   Sandez  .

variants.name: Sands
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Sandes was born about 1369, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Sandys, was 20 and his mother, Joan, was 20. He married Agnes Warrener in 1401, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 17 June 1435, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Sandes(이)가 대략 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sandys(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Agnes Warrener(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 6월 17일 영국 잉글랜드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.
